description.value: > General Feats > Overwhelming Hate You cannot abide those who would oppose your goalsâthe very thought makes your blood boil. Prerequisite: Manifestation level 6th. Gift: Once per day, you can declare an enemy to be a threat to your goal, allowing you to add your manifestation level as a bonus on damage rolls against that enemy. At manifestation level 8th, this extra damage is doubled. Stain: When you encounter a significant setback in reaching your goal (as determined by the GM), you must attempt a Will saving throw (DC = 15 + your manifestation level). On a failure, you attempt to take revenge on the party you consider responsible within the next few days, and your corruption progresses to the next stage.
